name: privacera-shield-common

metadata.name: privacera-shield-common
metadata.summary: Privacera AI Governance (PAIG) Shield Common Library

documentation:
# Common library for Privacera AI Governance Applications

The `privacera_shield_common` provides the common classes/functions used by the privacera AI governance applications. 

Register an account with Privacera AI Governance at https://privacera.ai.

classes.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.lru_cache_metrics_manager.LRUCacheMetricsManager

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.lru_cache_metrics_manager.LRUCacheMetricsManager.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the LRUCacheMetricsManager with a given OpenTelemetry meter and metrics name prefix.

Args:
    meter (Meter): The OpenTelemetry meter used to record metrics.
    metrics_name_prefix (str): The prefix used for the names of the metrics.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.lru_cache_metrics_manager.LRUCacheMetricsManager._setup
documentation:
Set up the observable gauges for cache metrics.

This method initializes lists to hold the callbacks for each metric and creates the observable gauges
with these callbacks.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.lru_cache_metrics_manager.LRUCacheMetricsManager._execute_callbacks
documentation:
Helper function to execute multiple callbacks.

Args:
    callbacks (list): A list of callback functions to be executed.

Returns:
    callable: A function that when called, executes all provided callbacks and aggregates their observations.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.lru_cache_metrics_manager.LRUCacheMetricsManager.register_for_metrics
documentation:
Register an LRU cache for metrics collection.

This method registers the provided LRU cache instance for metric collection by adding
callbacks that compute and return observations for cache size, hit ratio, and eviction rate.

Args:
    lru_cache (LRUCache): The LRU cache instance to register.
    attributes (dict): Additional attributes to associate with the metrics.

A manager class for handling OpenTelemetry metrics related to an LRU (Least Recently Used) cache.

This class allows for the creation and registration of observable gauges that track cache metrics such as
cache size, cache hit ratio, and cache eviction rate.

Attributes:
    meter (Meter): The OpenTelemetry meter used to record metrics.
    metrics_name_prefix (str): The prefix used for the names of the metrics.
    cache_size_metric_callbacks (list): List of callbacks for cache size metrics.
    cache_hit_ratio_metric_callbacks (list): List of callbacks for cache hit ratio metrics.
    cache_eviction_rate_metric_callbacks (list): List of callbacks for cache eviction rate metrics.

classes.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.fastapi_metrics_manager.FastAPIMetricsManager

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.fastapi_metrics_manager.FastAPIMetricsManager.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the FastAPIMetricsManager with the provided OpenTelemetry meter.

Args:
    meter: An OpenTelemetry meter instance for creating metrics.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.fastapi_metrics_manager.FastAPIMetricsManager._setup
documentation:
Sets up the various metrics for monitoring FastAPI applications.

This method creates counters, histograms, and gauges for tracking FastAPI-related metrics.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.fastapi_metrics_manager.FastAPIMetricsManager.register_for_metrics
documentation:
Registers the FastAPI application for metrics tracking using the provided app name.

Args:
    app: The FastAPI application instance.
    app_name (str): The name of the FastAPI application.

A manager class for handling FastAPI application metrics using OpenTelemetry.

This class sets up various metrics related to FastAPI applications, such as request counts,
response counts, request processing times, exceptions, and requests in progress.

Attributes:
    meter: The OpenTelemetry meter used for creating and recording metrics.

functions.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.utils.tracing_executor.run_in_executor_with_otel_tracing
documentation:
Run the given function within the OpenTelemetry tracing context in an asynchronous executor.

This method ensures that the provided function is executed in a separate thread while preserving the current tracing context.

Args:
    func (Callable[[], Any]): The function to run. It should not require any arguments.

Returns:
    Any: The result of the function execution.

Raises:
    ImportError: If the required OpenTelemetry libraries are not installed.

classes.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.custom_metrics_manager.CustomMetricsManager

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.custom_metrics_manager.CustomMetricsManager.init
documentation:
Initialize the CustomMetricsManager with a specific application name.

This method sets up the OpenTelemetry meter provider and creates a meter
for recording metrics. It must be called before any other methods in this class.

Args:
    application_name (str): The name of the application, used to create the meter.

Raises:
    ImportError: If the required OpenTelemetry libraries are not installed.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.custom_metrics_manager.CustomMetricsManager.register_lru_cache_metrics
documentation:
Register an LRU cache for metrics collection.

This method ensures that the LRU cache metrics manager is created and
registers the provided LRU cache for metric collection.

Args:
    lru_cache: The LRU cache instance to register.
    metrics_name_prefix (str): The prefix to use for the metric names.
    attributes (dict): The attributes to associate with the metrics.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If the manager has not been initialized.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.custom_metrics_manager.CustomMetricsManager.register_fastapi_metrics
documentation:
Register a FastAPI application for metrics collection.

This method sets up a FastAPI metrics manager and registers the provided
FastAPI application for metric collection.

Args:
    app: The FastAPI application instance to register.
    service_name (str): The name of the service to associate with the metrics.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If the manager has not been initialized.
    ImportError: If the required FastAPI metrics manager module is not installed.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.metrics.custom_metrics_manager.CustomMetricsManager._get_or_create_lru_cache_metrics_manager
documentation:
Get or create an LRU cache metrics manager.

This method retrieves an existing LRU cache metrics manager from the
internal dictionary or creates a new one if it does not exist.

Args:
    metrics_name_prefix (str): The prefix to use for the metric names.

Returns:
    LRUCacheMetricsManager: The LRU cache metrics manager instance.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If the manager has not been initialized.
    ImportError: If the required LRU cache metrics manager module is not installed.

A manager class for handling custom OpenTelemetry metrics, including metrics for LRU caches and FastAPI applications

This class is designed to be used as a singleton, ensuring that metrics are only initialized once per application.

Attributes:
    _initialized (bool): Indicates whether the manager has been initialized.
    _meter (Optional[Meter]): The OpenTelemetry meter used to record metrics.
    _lru_cache_metrics_manager_dict (dict): A dictionary to store LRU cache metrics managers.
    _fastapi_metrics_manager (Optional[FastAPIMetricsManager]): The metrics manager for FastAPI applications.

functions.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.utils.pyroscope_collector.enable_pyroscope
documentation:
Configures Pyroscope for profiling with the specified service name and server address.

Args:
    service_name (str): The name of the service to profile.
    server_address (str): The address of the Pyroscope server.

Raises:
    ImportError: If the Pyroscope library is not installed, prompts the user to install it.

functions.name: privacera_shield_common.otel.utils.logging_handler.setup_otel_logging_handler
documentation:
Set up the OpenTelemetry logging handler for the given logger.

This method configures the logger to use the OpenTelemetry logging handler,
which exports log records to an OTLP (OpenTelemetry Protocol) endpoint.

Args:
    logger (Logger): The logger to set up the handler for.
    service_name (str): The name of the service.
    service_instance_id (str, optional): The instance ID of the service.
        Defaults to the value of the "HOSTNAME" environment variable or "UNKNOWN".
    deployment_environment (str, optional): The deployment environment of the service.
        Defaults to the value of the "GLOBAL_ENV" environment variable or "UNKNOWN".
    service_namespace (str, optional): The namespace of the service.
        Defaults to the value of the "GLOBAL_NAMESPACE" environment variable or "UNKNOWN".
    otlp_endpoint (str, optional): The OTLP endpoint to export log records to.
        If not provided, the default exporter configuration is used.

Raises:
    ImportError: If the required OpenTelemetry libraries are not installed.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.file_utils.FileUtils.get_file_paths_in_directory
documentation:
Retrieves file paths in the specified directory.

Args:
    directory (str): The directory path.

Returns:

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.file_utils.FileUtils.load_json_from_file
documentation:
Loads JSON data from the specified file.

Args:
    file_path (str): The path to the JSON file.

Returns:
    obj: The JSON data loaded from the file.

Raises:
    FileNotFoundError: If the file does not exist.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.file_utils.FileUtils.read_json_file
documentation:
Loads list of JSON data from the specified file.

Args:
    file_path (str): The path to the JSON file.

Returns:
    obj: The list of JSON data loaded from the file.

Raises:
    FileNotFoundError: If the file does not exist.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.file_utils.FileUtils.append_json_to_file
documentation:
Appends JSON data to the specified file.

Args:
    file_path (str): The path to the JSON file.
    data (obj): The JSON data to append to the file.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.file_utils.FileUtils.remove_line_from_file
documentation:
Removes a specific line from a file.

Args:
    file_path (str): The path to the file.
    line_to_remove (obj): The line to remove from the file.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.file_utils.FileUtils.remove_empty_files
documentation:
Removes empty files from the spool directory, excluding specified files.

Args:
    spool_directory (str): The directory containing spool files.
    exclude_files (list): List of file names to exclude from deletion.

functions.name: privacera_shield_common.config_utils.load_config_file
documentation: You can load multiple config files, but order matters. The latest one will overwrite any
properties defined by previous config files

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.encryption.DataEncryptor.encrypt_chunk
documentation: Encrypts a chunk of data bytes and returns the base64 encoded encrypted data.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.encryption.DataEncryptor.decrypt_chunk
documentation: Decrypts a chunk of base64 encoded data and returns the decrypted data bytes.

classes.name: privacera_shield_common.lru_cache.LRUCacheEvictCallback

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.lru_cache.LRUCacheEvictCallback.__call__
documentation:
Call the callback function.

Args:
    key (str): The key of the item to be evicted.
    value (Any): The value of the item to be evicted.

Returns:

A callback to be called when an item is evicted from the cache.

classes.name: privacera_shield_common.lru_cache.LRUCache

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.lru_cache.LRUCache.stop_cleanup_thread
documentation:
Stop the cache cleanup thread.

Returns:
    None

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.lru_cache.LRUCache.get
documentation:
Retrieve a value from the cache by key.

Args:
    key (str): The key to retrieve the value for.

Returns:
    Any: The value associated with the key, or None if the key is not found.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.lru_cache.LRUCache.put
documentation:
Put a key-value pair into the cache.

Args:
    key (str): The key of the item to be stored.
    value (Any): The value to be stored.

Returns:
    None

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.lru_cache.LRUCache.remove
documentation:
Remove an item from the cache by key.

Args:
    key (str): The key of the item to be removed.

Returns:
    None

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.lru_cache.LRUCache.keys
documentation:
Get the keys of the cache.

Returns:
    List[str]: The list of keys in the cache.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.lru_cache.LRUCache.cleanup_idle_instance
documentation:
Clean up idle cache items periodically.

Returns:
    None

An implementation of a Least Recently Used (LRU) Cache.

Args:
    capacity (int): The maximum number of items the cache can hold.
    max_idle_time (int): The maximum time (in seconds) an item can remain idle in the cache.
    cleanup_interval_sec (int): The interval (in seconds) to call cache clearing check.

Attributes:
    cache (OrderedDict): An ordered dictionary to store key-value pairs, maintaining insertion order.
    capacity (int): The maximum capacity of the cache.
    max_idle_time (int): The maximum idle time (in seconds) allowed for cache items.
    last_access (Dict[str, datetime]): A dictionary to store the last access time of each cache item.
    lock (Lock): A threading lock to ensure thread safety.
    cleanup_interval_sec (int): The interval (in seconds) at which the cache cleanup is performed.
    cleanup_thread (Thread): A background thread for periodic cache cleanup.
    hits (int): The number of cache hits.
    misses (int): The number of cache misses.
    evictions (int): The number of cache evictions.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditEvent.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a AuditEvent object.

Keyword Arguments:
    event_time (str): The timestamp of the event.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditEvent.to_payload_dict

Returns a dictionary representation of the AuditEvent object.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditEvent.from_payload_dict
documentation:
Creates a AuditEvent object from a dictionary payload.

Args:
    payload_dict (dict): Dictionary containing attributes of the event.

Returns:

classes.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditSpooler

documentation:
Initializes an AuditSpooler object.

Args:

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditSpooler.get_spooled_audit_events
documentation:
Retrieves spooled audit events from the spool directory.

Returns:

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditSpooler.add_audit_event
documentation:
Adds an audit event to the spool directory.

Args:
    access_audit_event (AuditEvent): The audit event to add.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditSpooler.remove_audit_event
documentation:
Removes an audit event from the spool directory.

Args:
    access_audit_event (AuditEvent): The audit event to remove.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditSpooler.get_file_path_for_event_time
documentation:
Generates the file path for the given event time.

Args:
    event_time_millis (int): The event time in milliseconds.

Returns:
    str: The file path for the given event time.

Class to manage spooled audit events.

Args:
    audit_spool_dir (str): The directory path where spooled audit events are stored.

classes.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditLogger

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditLogger.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the AuditLogger.

Args:
    audit_spool_dir (str): Audit spool directory
    audit_event_cls (cls): Class of audit event

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditLogger.retry_failed_audit_events
documentation:
Periodically retries failed audit events from the failed audit event queue.

This method continuously retrieves failed audit events from the failed audit event queue,
adds them back to the audit event queue for retry, and waits for 2 minutes before retrying
again. The retry process ensures that failed audit events are reprocessed at regular intervals.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditLogger.load_spooled_audit_events
documentation:
Loads spooled audit events from the AuditSpooler and puts them into the audit event queue.

This method retrieves spooled audit events from the AuditSpooler and puts them into the audit event queue for processing.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditLogger.log
documentation:
Logs the provided data.

Args:
    audit_event (object): The audit event to be logged.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditLogger.run
documentation:
Runs the AuditLogger thread.

Continuously checks for new events in the audit_event_queue and pushes them to the server.

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.audit_spooler.AuditLogger.push_audit_event_to_server
documentation:
Abstract method to push an audit event to the server.

Subclasses must implement this method to define how audit events are pushed to the server.

Args:
    audit_event (T): The audit event to be pushed to the server.
        The type of the audit event is specified by the generic type parameter T.

Raises:
    NotImplementedError: If the method is not implemented by the subclass.

A class to log audit data and push it to a server.

Attributes:
    audit_spool_dir (str): A directory to store spooled audit files.

classes.name: privacera_shield_common.async_http_transport.AsyncHttpTransport

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.async_http_transport.AsyncHttpTransport.setup
documentation:
This optional method allows you to pass your own settings to be used by all the
AsyncShieldRestHttpClient instances.
\:param kwargs:

> - connect_timeout_sec
> - read_timeout_sec

```
return

```

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.async_http_transport.AsyncHttpTransport.close
documentation: Close the httpx AsyncClient.

class_variables.name: privacera_shield_common.async_http_transport.AsyncHttpTransport._read_timeout_sec
documentation: These are default settings that can be overridden by calling the setup method.
AsyncHttpTransport class maintains a single instance of httpx.AsyncClient for all the AsyncShieldRestHttpClient instances.

classes.name: privacera_shield_common.http_transport.HttpTransport

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.http_transport.HttpTransport.setup
documentation:
This optional method allows you to pass your own instance of the PoolManager to be used by all the
ShieldRestHttpClient instances.
\:param kwargs:

> - http: Instance of urllib3.PoolManager
> - max_retries
> - backoff_factor
> - allowed_methods
> - status_forcelist
> - connect_timeout_sec
> - read_timeout_sec

```
return

```

class_variables.name: privacera_shield_common.http_transport.HttpTransport._read_timeout_sec
documentation: These are default settings that can be overridden by calling the setup method.
HttpTransport class maintains a single instance of urllib3.PoolManager for all the ShieldRestHttpClient instances.

classes.name: privacera_shield_common.async_base_rest_http_client.AsyncBaseRESTHttpClient

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.async_base_rest_http_client.AsyncBaseRESTHttpClient.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the AsyncBaseRESTHttpClient instance.

Args:

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.async_base_rest_http_client.AsyncBaseRESTHttpClient.setup
documentation:
Set up the Async HTTP transport configuration (called only once).

Returns:
None

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.async_base_rest_http_client.AsyncBaseRESTHttpClient.get_auth
documentation:
Get the authentication configuration for the HTTP requests.

Returns:

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.async_base_rest_http_client.AsyncBaseRESTHttpClient.get_default_headers

methods.name: privacera_shield_common.async_base_rest_http_client.AsyncBaseRESTHttpClient.request
documentation:
Make an asynchronous HTTP request to the API.

Args:
    *args: Positional arguments for the request method.
    **kwargs: Keyword arguments for the request.

Returns:
    AsyncReturnValue: The HTTP response object.

class_variables.name: privacera_shield_common.async_base_rest_http_client.AsyncBaseRESTHttpClient._setup_done
documentation: Flag to track if setup has been performed
An asynchronous base class for making HTTP requests to a RESTful API using httpx.
